name: Yorkshire (United Kingdom)

colors.symbolism: the historic blue of the House of York

description: A light-blue field charged with a single white rose at the centre.
history: Adopted as the flag of the historic county of Yorkshire on 29 July 2008 (Yorkshire Day); registered with the Flag Institute the same year.

features.symbolism: the heraldic badge of the House of York; emblematic of Yorkshire since at least the 14th century
